response.yaml_spec:
add_numbers:
  evals:
    IsInteger:
      type: int
    CorrectSum:
      assertion: output == input[0] + input[1]
    FastExecution:
      duration: 0.001
  dataset:
  - case:
      id: positive_integers
      inputs:
      - 10
      - 20
      expected: 30
  - case:
      id: negative_integers
      inputs:
      - -5
      - -15
      expected: -20
  - case:
      id: mixed_signs
      inputs:
      - -10
      - 25
      expected: 15
  - case:
      id: zero_addition
      inputs:
      - 0
      - 100
      expected: 100
  - case:
      id: large_integers
      inputs:
      - 1000000
      - 2000000
      expected: 3000000
  - case:
      id: identity_property
      inputs:
      - 42
      - 0
      expected: 42
